title: Add delete option for saved scans

requirements.text: Add a clear delete option for each item in the Saved Scans gallery so users can remove saved scans, including a confirmation dialog before the delete is executed.
acceptanceCriteria: Each saved scan card in the Saved Scans gallery shows a delete control (trash icon or labeled delete button).
Clicking delete opens a confirmation dialog with English text explaining the action is permanent.
Confirming the dialog deletes the saved scan and it no longer appears in the gallery after deletion.
Canceling the dialog does not delete the saved scan.
Delete controls include accessible labels (e.g., aria-label) and are usable on mobile and desktop.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing UI components instead).
Do not modify immutable frontend hook entry points listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts/tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
nonGoals: Implementing tags or tag deletion for saved scans.
Adding backend persistence for saved scans (local-only behavior remains unchanged).
